questions.q: 39 men complete a task in 29 days. How long you will take 29 men to do the task?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation:
This is an inverse proportion problem.

Formula:

Men1​×Days1​=Men2​×Days2​

Given:

  • Men₁ = 39
  • Days₁ = 29
  • Men₂ = 29
  • Days₂ = ?
39×29=29×x
x=39×29/29​=39
